name: M4A1消音版 | 伊卡洛斯殒落
nameZh: M4A1消音版 | 伊卡洛斯殒落
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been painted with a hydrographic of feathers and melted wax around a sun motif. Turner's betrayal is my failure... I have to make this right - Sebastien Hennequet, Sniper
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用羽毛上的蜡在太阳图案周围融化的花纹进行了涂装。 特纳的背叛是我的过失…… 我一定会了解这个问题的 - 狙击手塞巴斯蒂安.轩尼奎特
